hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.xcodeproj'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .xcodeproj files directly. Edit project.yml instead and run xcodegen generate.' >&2; exit 2; fi
FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '.swift$'; then swift-format format -i "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi
